category_sources: Official Xapian site says Omega is a packaged website search engine supplied with Xapian: https://xapian.org/
source_facts.description says Omega is a packaged search engine for websites built on Xapian.
display_name_sources: Official Xapian documentation uses Omega as the search application name: https://xapian.org/docs/omega/overview.html
docs_sources: Official Omega overview is hosted under xapian.org/docs/omega.
Official Xapian docs index states the Omega search application has its own documentation.
repo_sources: Official Xapian Bleeding Edge page says the definitive git repo is https://git.xapian.org/xapian.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repository was researched.
tags_sources: Official Omega overview describes omindex, scriptindex, CGI searching, and OmegaScript templates.
source_facts.description identifies Omega as a website search engine on Xapian.
